title: Integrate Hubspots "Projects" with Board
excerpt: Hubspot has a new “projects” function that is essentially a task list that is basic and would be awesome if we can integrate with an existing Monday board so there’s a link out to more sophisticated project management wh…

posts.author: afin (Annie)
posts.cookedHtml: Hubspot has a new “projects” function that is essentially a task list that is basic and would be awesome if we can integrate with an existing Monday board so there’s a link out to more sophisticated project management where there will only show the items list.
